name: minicrm
description: Mini CRM - Client Lead Management System

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
